name: Moov API
description: The Moov API provides a comprehensive platform for payment processing, money movement, and financial account management. This API enables businesses to manage transfers, process refunds, handle disputes, issue cards, and integrate various payment methods including bank accounts, cards, Apple Pay, and wallets.
